entity.label: Jashen
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Sleeping, called also Hashem (1 Chr. 11:34); a person, several of whose sons were in David’s body-guard (2 Sam. 23:32).

nodes.label: Jashen
nodes.description: Sleeping, called also Hashem (1 Chr. 11:34); a person, several of whose sons were in David’s body-guard (2 Sam. 23:32).

verses.text: Eliahba the Shaalbonite, of the sons of Jashen, Jonathan,
